data.title: Northrop Grumman to report Q4 earnings on Jan. 27, expected $6.96 EPS and $11.62 billion revenue, share price fell 1.8% to $660.97.
data.description: Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) is scheduled to release its fourth-quarter earnings before the opening bell on Tuesday, Jan. 27. Analysts are predicting earnings of $6.96 per share, an increase from $6.39 per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue is $11.62 billion, up from $10.69 billion last year. In a recent announcement on Nov. 6, the company appointed John Greene as EVP and CFO. Following this news, Northrop Grumman's stock price closed at $660.97 on Monday, representing a 1.8% decrease. For more details, readers can access Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page to view the latest analyst ratings and insights.

data.title: Improved Pharma published research on Ritonavir Form IV's crystal structure in Crystal Growth & Design using MicroED, analyzing its thermodynamic relationships.
data.description: Improved Pharma recently released findings on the crystal structure of Ritonavir Form IV in a publication on Crystal Growth & Design. Through the use of micro-electron diffraction (MicroED), researchers were able to identify the anhydrous polymorph and determine its thermodynamic connection. This advancement offers valuable insights into the compound, with significant implications for pharmaceutical development.

data.title: Zscaler report: 91% increase in AI activity, causing security gap. Enterprises urged to adopt AI security platform.
data.description: The rapid integration of AI technology has led to a significant security vulnerability as organizations struggle to balance innovation and protection. To address this challenge, companies must implement an AI security platform founded on the principles of Zero Trust. This approach emphasizes continuous verification and strict access controls to safeguard against potential threats. The need for enhanced security measures is underscored by the increasing number of cyberattacks targeting AI systems, with global statistics showing a rise in successful breaches due to inadequate security protocols. This highlights the urgency for organizations to prioritize the implementation of robust AI security solutions to mitigate risks and ensure the integrity of their operations.

data.title: Zscaler introduces new innovations for enterprise AI security with enhanced capabilities for building, deploying, and using AI applications securely across organizations.
data.description: Organizations now have the ability to enhance visibility and security in creating, deploying, and utilizing AI applications throughout the enterprise. These recently introduced capabilities provide companies with the means to achieve a more comprehensive understanding of their AI initiatives. This advancement equips organizations with the tools to securely develop and implement AI applications within their operations. By leveraging these capabilities, companies can enhance their overall AI strategy and ensure the protection of their data.

data.title: BGC authorized by FCA as a benchmark admin, offering swaps pricing in EUR IRS, GBP IRS, XCCY swaps, EU & U.K. Inflation swaps.
data.description: In London, BGC Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BGC) disclosed that BGC Brokers L.P. has obtained authorization as a U.K. registered benchmark administrator licensee from the U.K. Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) under the U.K. Benchmarks Regulation. BGC's approved benchmark range encompasses swaps pricing in EUR IRS, GBP IRS, & XCCY swaps, along with EU and U.K. Inflation swaps. This development offers clients an FCA-approved benchmark service.

data.title: Importance of integrated planning highlighted; study shows majority struggle with execution despite recognizing its critical role.
data.description: In Amsterdam, a recent study by management and technology consultancy BearingPoint reveals that while planning has gained strategic importance for organizations in various industries, many are finding it challenging to effectively implement it. The study highlights that almost all surveyed companies acknowledge the significance of planning for business success. However, only a small portion of these organizations have managed to achieve comprehensive integrated planning that spans across functions. This underlines the gap between the recognition of planning's value and the actual realization of end-to-end integrated planning.

data.title: Battery Ventures hires David Coste, former Forterro executive, as executive-in-residence in London office.
data.description: In London, Battery Ventures, a global technology investment firm, has appointed David Coste, former Forterro executive, as an executive-in-residence in its London office, starting next month. Coste will collaborate with Battery Partner Zak Ewen and General Partner Morad Elhafed to identify and assess business-technology investments in Europe. Battery established its London office in 2016 and has been active since 2005.
